role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within domain constraints.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues as declared.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant biomes and agricultural patterns without drifting into regulatory or linguistic domains.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (guardrails, road width) and building standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (camera generation, architectural style) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Germany. The agents adhered strictly to their roles, providing consistent and image-grounded evidence. The tournament logic effectively used the regulatory and meta agents' strong support for Germany to distinguish it from the visually similar Austria.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of rolling hills, red-tiled roofs, and overcast sky match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of temperate deciduous forests and managed grasslands match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of steel guardrails and road width match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Observations about camera quality and building materials are consistent with the image.
